# Feature: MVE Dialog Audio UX (header duration + peaks + scene alignment)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-12 — epic mve-dialog-audio-ux -->

## Intent

When a dialog line has bound audio (generate/upload/record), the **header** duration chip shows **Audiolänge** and replaces the WPM estimate. The footer shows a **real waveform** from persisted peaks—not placeholder bars. Scene shell width should cover the clip after audio bind.

## Preconditions

- Local desktop, Hörspiel/audio project, Structure & Beats with MVE dialog lane
- At least one character with dialog text block

## Happy Path

- [ ] Text-only line: header shows WPM chip when text non-empty; footer „Kein Audio“
- [ ] After upload/record/generate with audio file: header shows **Audiolänge** (not WPM); tooltip „Audiolänge“
- [ ] Footer shows SVG waveform from `clip.waveformData` (not opacity-50 placeholder bars)
- [ ] No duplicate duration chip in footer when header shows audio length
- [ ] Pink scene shell grows to at least clip end after audio bind (content-driven projects)

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Compact tier (<120px): header chip hidden; audio duration not duplicated in footer
- [ ] Peaks still loading: loading placeholder acceptable until peaks arrive
- [ ] Text edited after audio bind: header stays on **Audiolänge** (audio is source of truth for chip)

## Regression

- [ ] Text-only blocks without audio unchanged (WPM header, empty footer)
- [ ] Existing MVE dedup + lane drag still work
- [ ] Playwright harness `mve-dialog-clip-inline-slice3` updated if assertions change

## Assumptions

- `persistClipAudioFile` peaks are sufficient for inline SVG footer (no WaveSurfer in footer)
- WPM still drives **width estimate** for text-only blocks; audio duration drives width when bound via clip span

## Implementation Notes

- `MveDialogClipCard`: header shows `variant="audio"` when `audioClipId` + `audioDurationSec`; footer `showDurationChip={false}` in that case
- `MveDialogClipWaveformFooter`: `showDurationChip` prop
- `useMveTextBlockAudioClip` + `useMveTextBlockUploadRecord`: persist `waveformData` peaks; upload uses `clip.startSec` not `0`
- `LocalAudioRepository.updateClip`: writes `waveform_json` + `cloud_audio_file_id`
- `audio-clip-api.ts`: `waveformData` on update payload type
- Supersedes split header/footer duration UX in `mve-dialog-duration-chips.md`
